title: Fisher Tiger’s Dream Is Revealed
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Shirahoshi, Fukaboshi, Jinbe. The core story beat is fisher tiger’s dream is revealed.
scene: The scene centers on fisher tiger’s dream is revealed, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Shirahoshi, Fukaboshi, Jinbe driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Out of my way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dosuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fuka- Boshi- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your high-ness!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ung hh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dosun- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ngh hh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is the meaning of this villainy....?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to think that you fiends would stoop...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...to making the people of this country trample upon images of my late mother!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: We failed to capture Vander Decken...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...and Shirahoshii was kidnapped by the straw hats right before our eyes...!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The Princess did say she'd be back "in time for dinner"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Obviously the pirates made her say that!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: If those pirates sell the princess to the tenryu- Ubito, why, I'll...!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Heyy!! Word is that those fishman district thugs are causing trouble in towns all across the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: What's happened to the palace?! What's going on on this island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keshi!!!!!!!!!!!!, look what I just saw!! That was one billing mermaid all right!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: An ordinary human-size mermaid goes for 70,000,000... and that Mermaid Princess was about 7.8 times that size...!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: If I were to capture and sell her...!! mmmmmmmhhh!!! I'm getting terrified just thinking about that kind of cash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ocean forest

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Waaa AaaAH!!!!! Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do not worry, your highness. Those fiends are in no position to harm his majesty just yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: EHA?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...R... really...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. Now, I must speak with Luffy- Sun and his companions for a short while.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I swear to you, I will rescue his majesty myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Thank you... Thank you so much, boss jimbei- SAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: LILL LILLA DIIIIT IIES!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: your tea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks. Just leave it over there for me, would you? And for the record, I'm trying to have a serious convert- sation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...so stop ruining the mood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mmmm, I love it when you get all stern!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, jimbei- San... What do you mean when you say that you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Unleashed along upon East Blue...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYU UUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quite...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've heard the same thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: quite some time ago... back when Luffy and I first heard the name "Jinbe".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I remember what Yosaku said back then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In return for his status as Shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that jimbe! unleashed a monstrous terror upon East Blue!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course, I'm sure Luffy's forgotten all about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm... did he say that...? I wonder how Yosaku's doing now!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: When I saw you and jimbel together in that newspaper two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I gotta admit, I didn't know what to think.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: After all, up until then, I'd been thinking of jimbei as something like the "man behind Arlong"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So, jimbei... I'm ready to listen to your excuses...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But you'd better choose your words carefully...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I'll have you know that our lovely Navigator Nami-San here was a resident of the island along took control of.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's suffered more than anyone thanks to Arlong's reign of Terror...!!

summary: Fisher Tiger’s Dream Is Revealed. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
